nodes.name: shared_views.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for shared view plans where views are referenced by multiple queries, testing view sharing and deduplication.

nodes.name: short_circuit.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for short-circuit evaluation optimization, verifying that AND/OR expressions prune branches in logical plans.

nodes.name: singleton.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for singleton distribution queries (no parallelism), testing plan generation for scalar subqueries and global aggregations.

nodes.name: sink.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for CREATE SINK statements, testing plan generation for various sink connector types and encoding options.

nodes.name: sink_into_table.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for SINK INTO TABLE statements, testing plan generation for sinking data directly into a RisingWave table.

nodes.name: stream_dist_agg.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for streaming distributed aggregation plans, verifying two-phase streaming aggregate operator placement.

nodes.name: struct_field_access.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for struct/record field access expressions, testing nested field projection plan generation.

nodes.name: struct_query.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for queries over STRUCT (composite) typed columns, covering construction, decomposition, and nested access plans.

nodes.name: subquery.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for subqueries including IN, EXISTS, scalar, and correlated subqueries, testing unnesting optimization.

nodes.name: subquery_expr.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for scalar subquery expressions and apply/unnest transformations in query plans.

nodes.name: subquery_expr_correlated.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for correlated subquery expressions, testing complex decorrelation and apply-to-join rewrite rules.

nodes.name: sysinfo_funcs.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for system information functions (pg_backend_pid, current_user, etc.), testing built-in system function plan generation.

nodes.name: table_primary_key.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for primary key handling in CREATE TABLE and INSERT statements, validating PK constraint plan generation.

nodes.name: temporal_filter.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for temporal filter operators (time-bounded streaming filters), verifying watermark-based temporal filter placement.

nodes.name: temporal_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for temporal join queries (stream-to-table joins with time versioning), testing temporal join plan generation.

nodes.name: time_window.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for time window functions (tumble, hop, session), testing window table function plan generation.

nodes.name: topn.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for TOP-N queries (ORDER BY + LIMIT), testing TopN operator plan generation and optimization.

nodes.name: tpch.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with TPC-H benchmark queries, testing plan generation for complex analytical queries on the standard TPC-H schema.

nodes.name: tpch_kafka.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with TPC-H queries over Kafka streaming sources, testing stream plan generation for real-time analytics.

nodes.name: tpch_variant.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with TPC-H query variants testing different optimizer choices and plan shapes for well-known analytical patterns.
